title: VoxelCraft textures
description: This texture pack add a unique style to your gameplay, similar to barebones but unique.
body:
![VoxelCraft logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e20251d7bb0bf1aa8afbf691209247950d9ef58_0.webp)
# **VoxleCraft Textures**
**VoxelCraft Textures  is a resource pack that overhauls vanilla Minecraft's textures by offering resolution of 128x**

## **Why should you download?**
**The pack is currently in beta for Java edition only. Once the pack is completed, the pack will be uploaded to Bedrock edition. The pack offers, you a uniqueness to your Minecraft gameplay, adding unique textures to items, blocks, mobs, everything!**

### **Follow the pack's updates:**
[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/voxelcraft_textures)
[Discord](https://discord.gg/H2HJ7N8n5B)
